mapper.select: SELECT MOVIE_ID , POSTER_URL , TITLE , MOVIE_RATING , OPEN_DATE , OPEN_COUNTRY , RUNNING_TIME , INTRODUCE , SYNOPSIS , ORIGINAL_TITLE , STATE , LANGUAGE , BUDGET , PROFIT FROM MOVIE

SELECT M.MOVIE_ID , M.POSTER_URL , M.TITLE , M.MOVIE_RATING , M.OPEN_DATE , M.OPEN_COUNTRY , M.RUNNING_TIME , M.INTRODUCE , M.SYNOPSIS , M.ORIGINAL_TITLE , M.STATE , M.LANGUAGE , M.BUDGET , M.PROFIT , F.FILE_NUM , F.FILE_GROUP_ID , F.OBFUSCATE_NAME , F.DISPLAY_NAME , F.EXTEND_NAME , F.FILE_LENGTH , F.FILE_PATH FROM MOVIE M LEFT OUTER JOIN FILES F ON M.MOVIE_ID = F.FILE_GROUP_ID WHERE M.MOVIE_ID = #{_parameter}
